TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taimali mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 102.29 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 4.53 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 57.38 km¬≤), 7,128 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 2,979 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 4,782 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 67%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Paywan, Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Taimali ays psgayun 9 ru 13 alang. 13 alang hani ga, Lupakatj , Tjavualji , Kiring , Tjatjigel , Anasolay , Davugele , Takidis , Padrangigrang , Calavi , Kanadun , Sasaljak , Lalauran , Cilalongay .
S.PHON: taimali mki s~…ēku taituŇč. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a ***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *.** km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), *,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na pajwan, amis~…ē ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u taimali ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, lupakatj , tja*ualji , kiriŇč , tjatji…£el , anas~…ēolaj , *a*u…£ele , taki*is~…ē , pa*raŇči…£raŇč , ¶~ ®ala*i , kana*un , s~…ēas~…ēaljak , lalauran , ¶~ ®ilaloŇčaj .
